    A generic doubly linked list implementation

    An iterator implementation for the GenericLinkedList.

    Node class representing an element in the linked list.
    get(int) - Method in class GenericLinkedList
    Returns the element at the specified index.
    getAllWords() - Method in class DictionaryBuilder
    Returns an alphabetically sorted list of all the different words
    getDiffWords() - Method in class DictionaryBuilder
    Gets the count of unique words in the dictionary.
    getFirst() - Method in class GenericLinkedList
    Returns the first element in the list
    getFrequency(String) - Method in class DictionaryBuilder
    Returns the number of repeats of a word
    getLast() - Method in class GenericLinkedList
    Returns the last element in the list
    getNumAllWords() - Method in class DictionaryBuilder
    Gets the total count of words processed, including duplicates.
    getRepeated() - Method in class entry
    Gets the number of times this word has been added
    getSize() - Method in class DictionaryBuilder
    Gets the current size of the hash table.
    getWord() - Method in class entry
    Gets the word stored in this entry.
